title: ranunculus coniformis
intro: Ranunculus coniformis, also known as buttercup, is a perennial plant belonging to the Ranunculaceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers with five petals. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to treat skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Ranunculus coniformis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable herb in herbal remedies. Ranunculus coniformis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as internally to boost immune function.
